content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.5-xhigh

## Summary

Reviewed the full branch delta against the requested fork point and ignored live .ralph-burning state. Verification passed: `nix build`, `nix develop -c cargo test --locked`, `nix develop -c cargo clippy --locked -- -D warnings`, and `nix develop -c cargo fmt --check`.

## Amendments

1. src/contexts/bead_workflow/pr_watch.rs:260 merges whenever the bot body reaction is `Approved`, while src/contexts/bead_workflow/pr_watch.rs:709 reduces reactions to content only and never proves that approval applies to the current head SHA read at src/contexts/bead_workflow/pr_watch.rs:431. After a PR gets `+1`, a later amend/force-push or CI-fix push can leave that old reaction in place; once the new CI run is green and old line comments are filtered away, `watch_pr` can squash-merge code the bot never reviewed. Carry enough review metadata through the port and require approval for `status.head_sha` before merging.
   Classification: fix_current_bead
   Rationale: Automatic merge on stale bot approval is a safety issue for the PR watcher.
